name: Flavored Honeys-NHB
recipeInstructions:
Use a 1-lb jar (1-1/2 cups) honey and add one of the following ingredients.
CITRUS. Add 1 tablespoon grated grapefruit, lemon, lime, or orange peel.
Heat mixture on low heat. Let stand at least 2 hours. Strain and pour honey into an 8-ounce jar with lid.
MINT. Add 1/4 cup chopped fresh mint. Heat mixture on low heat. Let stand at least 2 hours. Strain and pour honey into an 8-ounce jar with lid.
GINGER. Add 1 tablespoon julienne fresh ginger root. Heat mixture on low for 10 minutes. Let stand at least 2 hours. Strain and pour honey into an 8-ounce jar with lid.
ALLSPICE. Add 1 tablespoon whole allspice. Heat mixture on low for 10 minutes. Let stand at least 2 hours. Reheat mixture on low for another 10 minutes. Let stand overnight. Strain and pour honey into an 8-ounce jar with lid.
HOT (SPICY) HONEY. Add 1-1/2 teaspoons dried hot crushed red pepper. Heat mixture on low for 10 minutes. Let stand 1 to 2 hours. Strain and pour honey into an 8-ounce jar with lid.
Be careful not to boil or scorch the honey when heating. All flavors make about 1 cup.
